title: commersonia macrostipulata
intro: Commersonia macrostipulata, also known as the green plum or bush plum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used by the indigenous people for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, providing various health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The green plum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and has also been used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
